note: Auto-written by Mod Config Menu. Edit values in-game via the config menu.

Size.desc: Minimap circle diameter in pixels (only the porthole; inner map scale stays fixed).

Zoom.desc: Map zoom multiplier (higher = more zoomed in). Independent of size.

Position X.desc: Horizontal position of minimap center (percent of screen width).

Position Y.desc: Vertical position of minimap center (percent of screen height).
